narrative:
Lancaster City 5-D (precinct in Fairfield County) has 1,176 registered voters, with 62.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.7%, a modest Republican lean of 5.8 percentage points.
